meaning: adj.荳咲衍驕鍋噪,譛ｪ遏･逧⏋.荳咲衍蜷咲噪
examples: The motive for the killing is unknown.
The immediate cause of death is unknown.
Unknown attackers riddled two homes with gunfire.
Not so lucky were the shipwrecked crew of an unknown vessel washed up in 1860.
An unknown state Senator, Kay Hagan, now has pulled ahead of Elizabeth Dole in many polls.
